login.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

login.passwordNeedsLowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter

login.passwordNeedsSpecialChar: Password must contain at least one special character

acceptInvitation.title: Accept Your Invitation
acceptInvitation.description: Complete your account setup to join Hously.
acceptInvitation.invalidTokenMessage: This invitation link is invalid or has expired. Please contact your administrator for a new invitation.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.emailSent: If an account exists with this email, you will receive a password reset link shortly.
forgotPassword.error: An error occurred. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Reset your password
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been reset successfully. You can now log in with your new password.
resetPassword.invalidLinkMessage: This password reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.

calendar.title: Calendar

subscription.title: Calendar Subscription
subscription.description: Subscribe to your Hously calendar from Apple Calendar, Google Calendar, or any iCal-compatible app.
subscription.revokeConfirm: Are you sure? Existing calendar subscriptions will stop updating.
subscription.regenerateConfirm: Are you sure? Existing calendar subscriptions will need to be re-added.
subscription.instructions: Copy the URL and add it as a calendar subscription, or click "Open in Calendar" to add it automatically.

calendar.comingSoonDescription: We're working on more calendar features to help you stay in sync.

profile.title: Profile
profile.imageRequirements: Supported formats: PNG, JPG, WEBP, GIF. Max size: 5 MB.
profile.maxFileSizeError: Image is too large. Maximum size is 5 MB.
profile.avatarUpdateError: Failed to update profile picture. Please try again.
profile.newPasswordPlaceholder: Leave blank to keep current password
profile.passwordHelp: Password must be at least 8 characters long
profile.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters long
profile.updateError: Failed to update profile. Please try again.

activity.title: Activity
activity.description: Browse the paginated household activity feed with filters.

externalNotifications.title: External Notifications
externalNotifications.servicesDescription: Enable external services to receive webhook notifications.
externalNotifications.regenerateTokenConfirm: Are you sure you want to regenerate the token? The old token will no longer work.
externalNotifications.notifyAdminsOnlyDescription: When enabled, notifications will only be sent to admin users

events.MovieFileDeleteForUpgrade: On Movie File Delete For Upgrade
events.EpisodeFileDeleteForUpgrade: On Episode File Delete For Upgrade

logs.title: Service Logs
logs.description: View recent webhook activity and notification logs for all external services.

plugins.title: Plugins
plugins.description: Connect third-party plugins used by the dashboard.
plugins.invalidUrl: Please enter a valid URL (e.g. https://example.com)

jellyfin.help: Connect Jellyfin to fetch the latest items added to your media server.

tmdb.help: Configure TMDB so upcoming releases and media search can query TMDB from the server.
tmdb.popularityThresholdHelp: Minimum TMDB popularity score (0–100) for upcoming releases. Higher values show only mainstream titles.

weather.title: Weather
weather.help: Configure the dashboard weather location and preferred temperature unit.

prowlarr.help: Connect Prowlarr to run global release searches and send results to your configured download client.

jackett.help: Connect Jackett to run global release searches across your configured indexers.

qbittorrent.help: Connect qBittorrent to display live download queue stats on the dashboard.
qbittorrent.passwordPlaceholder: Leave empty to keep existing password
qbittorrent.setupNote: To enable automatic post-processing when a torrent completes, qBittorrent must be configured with a webhook autorun command.

scrutiny.help: Connect Scrutiny to show disk health and SMART temperatures on the dashboard.

beszel.help: Connect Beszel to show live system metrics and per-disk usage on the dashboard.
beszel.passwordSet: Password already set — leave blank to keep

adguard.help: Connect AdGuard Home to show DNS filtering and turn AdGuard on or off from Hously.
adguard.passwordPlaceholder: Leave empty to keep existing password

uptimekuma.help: Connect UptimeKuma to display monitor health on your homepage.
uptimekuma.apiKeyPlaceholderSet: Leave blank to keep existing key

homeAssistant.help: Control lights and smart plugs from the home dashboard. Use a long-lived access token from your Home Assistant profile.
homeAssistant.accessTokenPlaceholder: Paste token — leave empty to keep the saved token
homeAssistant.devicesHint: Select which entities appear on the home widget (only lights and switches).
homeAssistant.noDevicesFound: No lights or switches found. Check your token and that HA is reachable from the Hously server.

trackers.title: Trackers
trackers.description: Configure C411, Torr9 and La Cale in one place.
trackers.disclaimer: These integrations scrape private tracker websites and may violate their Terms of Service. Use at your own risk.
trackers.passwordPlaceholder: Leave empty to keep existing password

providerHelp.c411: C411 uses your site credentials for search and sync, plus your private announce URL for release publishing.

usernameHelp.c411: Used as the uploader name when syncing your releases back from C411.

dataExport.title: Export/Import
dataExport.description: Export and import application data. User IDs are replaced with emails for portability.
dataExport.exportDescription: Download all application data as a JSON file. User IDs will be replaced with email addresses.
dataExport.exportError: Failed to export data. Please try again.
dataExport.importDescription: Upload a JSON file to import data. User emails will be resolved to user IDs. Records with missing users will be skipped.
dataExport.importError: Failed to import data. Please check the file format and try again.
dataExport.importSummary: Imported: {{chores}} chores, {{reminders}} reminders, {{shoppingItems}} shopping items, {{taskCompletions}} task completions.
dataExport.importWarnings: {{count}} warning(s) occurred during import. Check console for details.

qualityProfiles.title: Quality profiles
qualityProfiles.listDescription: Rules used to score Prowlarr releases when a library item has a profile assigned.
qualityProfiles.formDescription: Minimum resolution, preferred source and codec order, optional size cap, and HDR rules.
qualityProfiles.name: Name
qualityProfiles.deleteConfirm: Delete profile "{{name}}"? Library items using it will be unassigned.
qualityProfiles.empty: No profiles yet. Create one above.

mediaLibrary.title: Media library
mediaLibrary.description: After torrents complete, Hously can hardlink or move video files into a clean folder layout and optionally remove the torrent from qBittorrent once a seed ratio is reached.
mediaLibrary.minSeedRatio: Remove torrent from qBittorrent when ratio reaches (0 = immediately after processing)
mediaLibrary.noIndexerConfigured: No indexer manager configured. Enable Prowlarr or Jackett in Plugins settings.
mediaLibrary.defaultQualityProfileHint: Automatically assigned to new items added to the library.
mediaLibrary.scanDescription: Walk a folder, match video filenames to TMDB, and add items as already downloaded. Requires TMDB to be configured.

arrImport.title: Import library from Radarr / Sonarr
arrImport.description: One-time migration: scans files with MediaInfo and copies titles into the native library.
arrImport.importFailedUnknown: Import failed with an unknown error

jobs.title: Background Jobs
jobs.description: Monitor and manage scheduled server jobs, queue health, and recent job history.
jobs.error: Failed to execute job. Please try again.

history.title: Recent Activity
history.description: Last 50 completed and failed jobs across all queues.
